mainEntity.name: Evidence needed for crush injury from unguarded press in North Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: Evidence needed for crush injury from unguarded press in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Incident reports, maintenance logs, witness affidavits, machine blueprints showing missing safeguards.[1][6]

suggestedAnswer.text: OSHA 1910.217 mandates guards. Expert reconstruction proves defect. North Salt Lake manufacturers face scrutiny.[1][6]

name: Evidence for Unguarded Machine Crush Claims
